subject: xone: use firmware according to PID.
author: Sorgelig
provenance_doc_ref: docs/patch-provenance.md:381 — listed as one of 7 xone commits in §3.5, status ✅ re-sourced

impact.effect_if_absent: Xbox Wireless Dongle would load incorrect firmware file (hardcoded single name), resulting in wrong radio calibration or firmware load failure on older PID 0x02e6 dongles

superseded_by: package/xone (dlundqvist/xone fork, commit f2aa9fe01103d7600553b505b298ff0bd47ff280 and later)

notes: MiSTer's 5.15 fork vendored the original medusalix/xone driver and patched in per-PID firmware support (this commit). However, the actively-maintained dlundqvist/xone fork — which we now package as BR2_PACKAGE_XONE — already natively includes identical per-PID firmware logic (sprintf(fwname, "xone_dongle_%04x.bin", fw_product) in transport/dongle.c:1117). This commit is therefore NOT a carry: it's functionality already present in our packaged source tree. Documentation of both PIDs' firmware is handled by package/xow-firmware/, which ships xone_dongle_02fe.bin (new adapter, also aliased to xow_dongle.bin for stock parity) and xone_dongle_02e6.bin (old adapter, a distinct 70008-byte blob from a different Microsoft .cab). Both external-USB PIDs are covered; PIDs 0x02f9 and 0x091e are soldered-in laptop modules and deliberately omitted (docs/decisions/0003-xone-firmware.md). Verified independently: dlundqvist source f2aa9fe01103d7600553b505b298ff0bd47ff280 (package/xone/xone.mk XONE_VERSION) contains transport/dongle.c:1110-1118 (fw_product logic) and :1307-1308 (id assignment), matching the MiSTer commit's intent byte-for-byte.
